characters.name: Afina
characters.description: AFINABiographical InformationFull nameAfinaAliasAn entitled stuck-up inbred bitch with a Nazi complex(byTesla)BornBefore 1000 A.D.Died2011East AfricaAgeAt least 1000+StatusDeceased †(cause of death: explosion resulting fromholographic mapdetecting vampire DNA)Physical InformationSpeciesVampireAbilitiesLongevitySuperhuman strengthSuper speedAccelerated healingHeightened sensesGenderFemaleHair colorBlackRelativesSiblingsKalmin(brother)†Extended familyAt least two nephewsAffiliationsOccupations / RolesQueen of vampiresAppearancesPortrayed byAliyah O'BrienAppears inEpisode 3x16 - "Awakening"Type of roleOne-shot character Afinawas the last queen of thevampires. Like most of her kind, she desires world domination, and longs for the days when vampires again rule the world, just as they used to.Nikola Teslaultimately dubs her "An entitled stuck-up inbred bitch with a Nazi complex". Afina sealed in crystal.

characters.name: Alexei
characters.description: ALEXEIBiographical InformationFull nameAlexeiAliasGhoul(byAshley)Born1997 / 1998UkraineAge10-years-oldStatusAlivePhysical InformationSpeciesHuman(abnormal)AbilitiesMutated abdominal appendageGenderMaleHair colorBrownEye colorBrownRelativesParentsUnnamed motherUnnamed fatherJagna Lutrova(adoptive mother)Jagna's Husband(adoptive father)Extended familyJagna Lutrova's father(adoptive grandfather)†AffiliationsNationalityUkrainian[1]Russian[2]AppearancesPortrayed byCainan WiebeAppears inEpisode 0x01 - "Webisode 1"Episode 0x02 - "Webisode 2"Episode 0x03 - "Webisode 3"Episode 0x04 - "Webisode 4"Episode 1x01 - "Sanctuary for All, Part I"Episode 1x02 - "Sanctuary for All, Part II"Type of roleRecurring character(web series)One-shot character(TV series) Alexeiis a young abnormal boy first encountered shortly beforeWill Zimmermanjoined theSanctuary Network. His abnormality is a snake-like extra limb that can easily kill people, but acts as a defensive mechanism when he is afraid. He is said to be a result of the radiation from theChernobyldisaster. Fearing he would be taken away and experimented on by the government, his parents, who loved him deeply, sent him away toNorth Americafor his own protection. AsHelen Magnusexplained, many children like Alexei are adopted by well-meaning immigrant families and many of them have certain problems either mental or physical. Alexei's problem however caused him to be shunned by his adopted family especially when their fear kept agitating the appendage. Also, the family who adopted him were religious, and this caused them to see Alexei like some kind of a demon or monster. They kept him hidden and locked up in a room in their apartment, only letting him out to eat.

characters.name: Bigfoot
characters.description: BIGFOOTBiographical InformationFull nameBigfootAliasBig GuyBiggieDiedEarly 2012Homeland,Fifth Ward,Old CityAge60+ years-oldStatusUnknown(presumed deceased †)(cause of death: severe blunt force trauma resulting from pummeling, kicking, and stomping)Physical InformationSpeciesNeanderthalAbilitiesStrengthThick skinGenderMaleHair colorBrownEye colorWeb series: yellowTV series: blue(right eye)/ green(left eye)RelativesSignificant othersCecile(ex-lover)ChildrenHenry Foss(son figure)Extended familyAlice Foss-Myers(granddaughter figure)AffiliationsOrganizations / GroupsSanctuary NetworkOccupations / RolesManservantAppearancesPortrayed byChristopher HeyerdahlType of roleMain character Bigfootis a humanoidabnormaland a former patient ofDr. Helen Magnus, who is now her manservant and a trusted agent of theSanctuary Network. Bigfoot arrived at theOld City Sanctuaryin 1951.[1]After Magnus removed "more than a few bullets" from him, he would not leave the Sanctuary, so she gave him a position on her staff.[2]He acts as a butler, chauffeur, bodyguard, medical assistant, and general handyman. He appears to be an intelligentneanderthalspecies. Before he met Magnus he liked to scare little children.[3]

Bigfoot arrived at theOld City Sanctuaryin 1951.[1]After Magnus removed "more than a few bullets" from him, he would not leave the Sanctuary, so she gave him a position on her staff.[2]He acts as a butler, chauffeur, bodyguard, medical assistant, and general handyman. He appears to be an intelligentneanderthalspecies. Before he met Magnus he liked to scare little children.[3]
